Spring Data Elasticsearch
  1. org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core
  2. ReactiveElasticsearchOperations

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.ReactiveElasticsearchOperations

Packages that use ReactiveElasticsearchOperations
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc
This package contains classes that use the new Elasticsearch client library (co.elastic.clients:elasticsearch-java) to access Elasticsearch.
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core
 
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.repository.query
 
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.repository.support
 
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.repository.support.querybyexample

    Class
    Description

    ReactiveElasticsearchTemplate
    Implementation of ReactiveElasticsearchOperations using the new Elasticsearch client.

  • Uses of ReactiveElasticsearchOperations in org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core

    Classes in org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core that implement ReactiveElasticsearchOperations
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractReactiveElasticsearchTemplate
    Base class keeping common code for implementations of the ReactiveElasticsearchOperations interface independent of the used client.
    Methods in org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core that return ReactiveElasticsearchOperations
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ReactiveElasticsearchOperations
    AbstractReactiveElasticsearchTemplate.withRefreshPolicy(@Nullable RefreshPolicy refreshPolicy)
     
    ReactiveElasticsearchOperations
    ReactiveElasticsearchOperations.withRefreshPolicy(@Nullable RefreshPolicy refreshPolicy)
    Returns a copy of this instance with the same configuration, but that uses a different RefreshPolicy.
    ReactiveElasticsearchOperations
    AbstractReactiveElasticsearchTemplate.withRouting(RoutingResolver routingResolver)
     
    ReactiveElasticsearchOperations
    ReactiveElasticsearchOperations.withRouting(RoutingResolver routingResolver)
    Returns a copy of this instance with the same configuration, but that uses a different RoutingResolver to obtain routing information.
